name: MD Foysal Ahmed
title: AI Researcher & Software Engineer
bio: Visionary AI researcher and software engineer bridging academia, industry, and innovation. Specializing in computer vision, deep learning, and hybrid intelligence systems.
summary: Experienced AI researcher with a Master's in Software Engineering and Bachelor's in Computer Science and Technology from Southwest University of Science and Technology. Published in top-tier journals including AI and Ethics, Pattern Analysis and Applications, and Signal Image and Video Processing. Passionate about advancing human potential through intelligent systems.
